_comment: Standards this exercise app COMMITS to conforming to (Layer 1), plus candidate standards it exhibits that have no WE standard yet (Layer 2). The benchmark validates each declared standard: resolves in the registry? available (active)? used per its real contract (evidence)? A declared standard not yet active is a GAP — the WE work this app drives. `evidence` is a regex proving the app consumes the standard's contract, not a reimplementation. See docs/agent/exercise-app-workflow.md.

standards.concept: selecting a loan row to inspect (now via the master-detail coordinator)
client-side navigation between app views (module bar, detail deep-links)
the loan application's guarded, role-scoped status machine
semantic status chips for state + finding
the loan's immutable history; lifecycle transitions auto-log + a timeline
the proof-of-compliance trace as a normalized DecisionRecord
the pipeline row → trace detail coordination
